NWS SURVEY TEAM CONCLUDED A MACROBURST OF STRAIGHT LINE WINDS IMPACTED BEE AND SAN PATRICIO CO. GREATEST CONCENTRATION OF DAMAGE OCCURRED ROUGHLY ALONG A 40 MILE LONG PATH FROM APPROX 10 MILES NW OF BEEVILLE TO 3 MILES E OF TAFT. PEAK WIND SPEEDS ESTIMATED AT 80 TO 85 MPH IN BEEVILLE...85 TO 90 MPH IN SKIDMORE...60 TO 70 MPH IN TAFT. THIS CAUSED EXTENSIVE AND WIDESPREAD TREE DAMAGE... CROP DAMAGE... DAMAGE TO NUMEROUS UTILITY POLES...MANY HOMES AND MOBILE HOMES WERE DAMAGED.
